sourceProvenance.source: @nepalibhasha/converter MIT baseline plus project-owned reviewed hard-case mappings
sourceProvenance.notes: This manifest documents the semantic profile shape. The runtime semantic maps are generated from bundled safe maps in src/engine/legacy/profile.ts; unsafe legacy maps are not copied.

diagnosticFingerprint.notes: Provisional plain-text diagnostic fingerprint only. Ratios are conservative routing signals, not corpus-derived profile proof.

R.notes: Reviewed hard-case guard for उच्चतम् stress fixture; runtime map carries atoms/evidence.

?.notes: Profile-aware suffix token; literal punctuation is protected or warned by mixed/document mode.

boundaryRules.description: Terminal ? may encode रू in reviewed Preeti spans; literal question marks stay punctuation in protected/English context.
Legacy short-i is typed before the visual cluster but assembled after the Unicode base cluster.
